text.title: Task File Template: Phase-by-Phase Checklist
text.summary: Ordered checklist for creating a complete TASK_NNN.md file from file structure through quality gate before assignment to an executor.

list.item: Create file at .aidocs/features/{status}/{feature}/todo/TASK_{NNN}_{slug}.md
Add task identifier TASK_{NNN}
Set status: todo (when created)
Add feature name and created date
Create reference table with Document, Path links
Link to spec.md at feature level
Link to design.md at feature level
Link to implementation-plan.md at feature level
Read actual done/ task files — do not work from memory
Create table showing dependencies: Task ID, Status, Key Output
For each dependency: show what it provided that this task uses
Verify no circular dependencies
For each FR from spec: paste full FR-X text inline
For each AD from design: paste full AD-X text inline
State which part(s) this task covers
Show traceability back to spec
Single, measurable goal — 2-3 sentences
Specific and actionable for an AI agent
If title contains "and" — split into two tasks
State which tasks must complete first
Format: "TASK_{XXX} must complete first (provides {what})"
Use Finish-to-Start (FS) dependency type
Mark blocking relationships explicitly
Use Given-When-Then format (or "Given/Triggered by/Then" for background jobs)
Cover happy path scenarios
Cover error scenarios
Cover boundary conditions
Each criterion is testable — pass/fail verifiable by running a test or command
Tag each AC item with FR-X reference
Step-by-step numbered approach
Research phase (read existing code)
Implementation phase (write code)
Testing phase (write tests)
Verification phase (ensure AC met)
Steps ordered to match file change order — avoids import errors
Table: File, Action (CREATE/MODIFY), Scope
For CREATE: what to create and purpose
For MODIFY: what changes and extent
Include test files explicitly
State total token count with breakdown: SDD docs + dependency tree + research + impl + tests
Total must be <100k
Test files: budget at least 20-40k for Django viewsets or React component tests
If total exceeds 100k: split at natural boundary (interface → implementation → API layer)
Objective is single, clear, achievable
Acceptance criteria cover happy path and errors — all testable
Dependencies documented
Files list is complete including test files
Token estimate <100k with breakdown
Task is atomic — one responsibility only
Status is "todo" and file is in todo/ directory
